acceptance_criteria.description: Completion requires an observable check that demonstrates the requested behavior and a negative or edge-path check where the implementation surface supports one

constraints: Keep the implementation to the smallest safe MVP that satisfies the task goal
Non-goal: Do not perform credential handling, billing, production deployment, legal or medical judgment, security-sensitive authority choices, or ambiguous external side effects

evaluation_principles.description: All required Seed Draft Ledger sections are resolved before execution.
evaluation_principles.name: ledger_completeness

evaluation_principles.description: Run the narrowest relevant local tests, type checks, or smoke checks for the changed behavior; report any verification gap explicitly.
evaluation_principles.name: observable_verification

exit_conditions.criteria: Run the narrowest relevant local tests, type checks, or smoke checks for the changed behavior; report any verification gap explicitly.
exit_conditions.description: All acceptance criteria pass under the verification plan.
exit_conditions.name: acceptance_verified

exit_conditions.criteria: No listed failure mode is observed in verification evidence.
exit_conditions.description: Known failure modes are absent: Failure includes unverified behavior, non-reproducible output, or scope expansion beyond the MVP.
exit_conditions.name: failure_modes_absent

initial_seed_before_repair.goal: Build a small habit-tracker CLI that lets the user add, list, and check off habits, persisting them as JSON in the working directory.

ontology_schema.description: Auto-synthesized ontology from the completed Seed Draft Ledger.

fields.description: Assume the primary actor is the user or automation agent described by the goal; do not introduce additional actor classes.
fields.name: actors

fields.description: Use only inputs already present in the goal, repository state, or explicit interview answers; do not require new external data.
fields.name: inputs

fields.description: Produce the smallest observable artifact, state change, or response needed to satisfy the goal and make verification possible.
fields.name: outputs

fields.description: Use the current repository/worktree runtime and established project conventions; do not choose a new framework, provider, or deployment target.
fields.name: runtime_context

ontology_schema.name: BuildASmallHabit

question_history.answer: [from-auto][conservative_default] Proceed with a conservative MVP: keep scope small, prefer existing project patterns, document assumptions, and make completion verifiable with observable acceptance criteria.
question_history.question: What else should we know?
